text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm headed to the gym to pick up Mejiro
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, my entire body is throbbing with pain. This
must be what Ryan meant by "screaming muscles."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, there's no time to rest. Next, I need to
do fifty—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Yes, but I haven't met today's quota
yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm working on the muscle training regimen Ryan
gave me, you see. I must finish the entire thing,
no matter what.
choice_data_list: But you've clearly already hit your limit.
But you've clearly already hit your limit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Naturally. After all, I specifically asked for a regimen that would push me beyond my limits.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If I'm unable to surpass the limit looming right
before my eyes, I cannot possibly call myself a
Mejiro!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Please don't try to stop me! This is all for the
purpose of achieving victory! One... two... three...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Four... five... Hehe, the night wind is refreshing...
and the hot spring was the perfect temperature.
Just marvelous...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nearly time for the baseball game. This TV
looks old, but... this is another pleasure of
traveling. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I also secretly brought some treats with me, and
there isn't anyone here to stop me. Hehe, now
then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hit that ball, Yu-ta-ka! Hit that ball, Yu-ta-kaaa!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh? I thought I just heard a familiar voice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It would be nice if I could stay and relax here, but
it doesn't look like I can anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
choice_data_list: You were in the middle of a desperate workout.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I-is that so? I feel I've just woken up from the
strangest dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I'm filled to the brim with strength. I
think I may have surpassed my limits!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has indeed done just that. Mejiro McQueen is
looking stronger than ever.
